title: Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal BREAKING
snippet: Adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf REJECTS Trump deal. BREAKING NEWS.

title: Axios: Trump may delay Iran infrastructure attacks
snippet: Trump may delay attacks on Iranian infrastructure if he sees real signs of a deal.

title: WSJ: US and Iran positions too far apart for ceasefire before deadline
snippet: US and Iran positions remain too far apart for a ceasefire before Trump's deadline.

title: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA
snippet: Iran rejects ceasefire via IRNA, conveying response to US via Pakistan. Emphasizes necessity of permanent end to the war.

title: Axios: Trump may hold off strikes extend deadline
snippet: Trump may hold off on strikes against civilian infrastructure in Iran and extend deadline if he sees deal coming together, defense official says.

title: WTI oil $115.50/barrel BREAKING
snippet: US oil prices extend gains to $115.50/barrel, now up +110% since the December 2025 low. Inflation expectations are rising.

title: ROBO Put/Call Ratio 1.0 highest 20 years
snippet: Fear among retail investors rising: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0, highest in at least 20 years.

title: Iran delivered 10-point response BREAKING
snippet: Iran delivered its 10-point response to US 15-point peace plan. Guarantee no further attacks, permanent war end, end Israeli strikes in Lebanon.

title: Trump military press conference 1PM ET BREAKING
snippet: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires. Declares Tuesday power plant and bridge day.

title: OPEN THE F****N STRAIT BREAKING
snippet: Trump: OPEN THE F****N STRAIT — threatens Iran with living in hell if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday power plant and bridge day.

title: I want to seize Iran oil
snippet: Trump: I want to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.

title: Trump Hormuz tolls
snippet: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump rejects ceasefire
snippet: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.

title: Every bridge in Iran will be decimated
snippet: Trump: Every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.

title: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire wants permanent end
snippet: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal — wants permanent end to the war.

title: Asia markets higher ceasefire hopes
snippet: Asia-Pacific markets set to open higher as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran war. Trump renewed threat to target civilian infrastructure.

title: US stocks whipsaw ceasefire doubts
snippet: US stocks whipsaw as Trump warns Iran strikes could escalate by Tuesday — casting doubt on ceasefire hopes.

title: Trump threatens take out Iran in one night
snippet: Trump threatens to take out Iran in one night if no deal before Tuesday deadline. Wants Tehran to reopen Strait of Hormuz.

title: Oman Iran Strait of Hormuz transit
snippet: Oman and Iran discuss Strait of Hormuz transit amid ceasefire doubts.
